overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic neon-lit city during golden hour. The car travels under massive overpasses, through tunnels, and past towering billboards while navigating moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban street with overhead billboards

events.description: entering the shadow of the massive overpass structure

agents.ego_description: driving forward through city traffic, approaching the overpass

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large metal framework supporting multiple digital billboards
massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: Driving on a sunlit multi-lane city street toward a massive overpass structure. Large digital billboards are mounted overhead while a silver sedan drives ahead in the same lane. The vehicle approaches and enters the shadow of the overpass around the 8-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with digital advertising displays

events.description: entering dark underpass, switching from sunlight to artificial lighting
passing red 'M Ebunike' metro station sign

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dimly lit tunnel under the overpass

entered.detail: concrete walls lined with vertical digital advertisement screens
red illuminated metro station sign indicating Ebunike station
dark concrete ceiling with structural beams

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dark covered underpass with artificial lighting illuminating the concrete walls and digital ad screens. The vehicle passes the red 'M Ebunike' metro station sign before approaching the tunnel exit. Oncoming traffic is visible in the opposite lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with futuristic skyscrapers

events.description: exiting tunnel back into bright sunlight
navigating a gentle right curve in the road

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated highway, passing various vehicles

notable_agents.action: green sports car overtaking on the left

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with green and orange stripes marked with 02
futuristic elevated train track running parallel to road
tall building with large holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into bright golden hour sunlight on an elevated highway. The road curves gently to the right past a distinctive cylindrical tower marked '02' and an elevated monorail track. A green sports car overtakes on the left while holographic billboards illuminate the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway with flying vehicle traffic overhead

events.description: camera tilts upward to observe flying vehicle passing overhead

agents.ego_description: briefly looking up at a flying car while continuing to drive, then returning gaze to road

notable_agents.action: flying car passing overhead on the monorail track

entered.detail: futuristic hovering car traveling on elevated track

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated highway while the camera tilts upward to observe a flying vehicle traveling on the monorail track overhead. The vehicle passes above the car before the camera returns to the forward driving position, with industrial buildings and billboards lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic city, transitioning from a sunlit street into a dark underpass before emerging onto a bright, elevated highway. It begins on a multi-lane road beneath massive digital billboards, following a silver sedan as the vehicle glides into the deep shadow of a towering overpass. The scene then shifts into a dimly lit concrete tunnel illuminated by artificial lights and a red metro station sign, passing oncoming traffic before approaching the exit. As the camera breaks back into the golden hour sunlight, the road curves right past a cylindrical tower and an elevated monorail track while a green sports car speeds past on the left. Finally, the camera tilts upward to track a flying vehicle gliding overhead before returning to the road, flanked by industrial buildings and holographic displays.
